sgf:
(;TR[rf]LB[ne:a]LB[of:b]LB[pa:c]LB[pb:d]LB[pf:e]LB[qg:f]AB[mc][nb][nc][oc][oe][pd][pe][qd][re][rf]AW[kc][ob][od][pc][qc][qe][qf][rc][rd]C[FORCE]AP[goproblems autoextractor]PW[lamarea]PB[BBJkgGo]PC[The KGS Go Server at http://www.gokgs.com/]DT[2010-02-11]PL[W]GPKEY[local choice]DIFF[20k]HSL[+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++]
(;W[qg]TR[re]TR[rf]LB[rg:B]C[Playing here is worth about 10 points over playing away in an empty corner. The stones marked with a triangle are dead. Black would have played at the same place if you played away. Black would likely play at B next. RIGHT])
(;W[ne];B[qg]TR[qc]TR[rc]TR[rd]TR[pc]C[This loses about 7 points. The stones marked with a triangle are weaker. ])
(;W[of];B[qg]TR[re]TR[rf]C[This loses about 10 points. The stones marked with a triangle are alive. ])
(;W[pf];B[qg]TR[re]TR[rf]C[This loses about 7 points. The stones marked with a triangle are alive. ])
(;W[pa];B[qg]TR[qe]TR[qf]SQ[re]SQ[rf]C[This loses about 10 points. The stones marked with a triangle are dead. The stones marked with a square are alive. ])
(;W[pb];B[qg]TR[qe]TR[qf]SQ[re]SQ[rf]C[This loses about 10 points. The stones marked with a triangle are weaker. The stones marked with a square are alive. White makes about 6 corner points. ]))
